title: oxydectes metallica
side_effects: Oxydectes metallica can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. Ingestion of the plant's toxic compounds can lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. In severe cases, improper use of Oxydectes metallica can even trigger anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction.
